Flat concept inventory:

- Hallucination Correction | papers: d7ea898cc97754e06d209df0fd55ab60250601f2; 71ba5f845bd22d42003675b7cea970ca9e590bcc; f12a6168ed8de1aee69fee51b469b1aecd5f903e; 68f0695aad787fdfbce4ec3992fea78641b91552; e0dc8e113dbdd2896fb6420ac93e0b976c47f2a2; 911010d91fb5f632a99be2eb9f57d57287f248e9; 2b2591c151efc43e8836a5a6d17e44c04bb68260; 984d4a1d41bfc8184fb77b8aa0eb8e96d536d048; 7db7653c581d7823cb9c328f2d742ec70d7a0ce4; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 36a364316c7bab6ed2a599ad2ce364fb2cd3e9dc; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 889feabe31ba0d24c093ac94d54a06eecb87e3f4; 4f2ae5fa2dc74af9c36ee57b359a4b3241006a92; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 6e697cc10bec83748a835e116bf5cb782446dd81; 490d8006851b1562cfd9ec1f057471f2868289d1; 572b92972eff7501ca2b109b8998cdcb69aa1958; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; 002c256d30d6be4b23d365a8de8ae0e67e4c9641; e5c72b92c48d68594b290c84a8904da7c8335554; 05e003a34148d4663734d3f39deefa0979d2a0e6; 88884b8806262a4095036041e3567d450dba39f7; 80fd20e175f83a699258b8780cf365418d1538b0; 7d8905a1fd288068f12c8347caeabefd36d0dd6c; cc78babfacce48e715dac56886d7dd9746cfcab0; 49408c5e1ac75854f1580e561384df2be870d559; 12f881588e6b461b86b34209c30a2bdfe67f904d; 5c0148e2ee4efc33731335fac26780a3fb79e16c; - Parameter Adaptation | papers: d7ea898cc97754e06d209df0fd55ab60250601f2; 71ba5f845bd22d42003675b7cea970ca9e590bcc; f12a6168ed8de1aee69fee51b469b1aecd5f903e; 68f0695aad787fdfbce4ec3992fea78641b91552; e0dc8e113dbdd2896fb6420ac93e0b976c47f2a2; 911010d91fb5f632a99be2eb9f57d57287f248e9; 2b2591c151efc43e8836a5a6d17e44c04bb68260; 984d4a1d41bfc8184fb77b8aa0eb8e96d536d048; 7db7653c581d7823cb9c328f2d742ec70d7a0ce4; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 36a364316c7bab6ed2a599ad2ce364fb2cd3e9dc
